ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was produced */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the vehicle */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine specifications */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "VIN" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_body_style FOREIGN KEY ("body_style") REFERENCES body_styles ("body_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine FOREIGN KEY ("engine") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the make */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the model started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the model ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., trim level, special edition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_styles" (
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body style */,
  "body_style_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle body style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body style */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors of the body style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the type (e.g., engine, transmission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle engine */,
  "displacement" TEXT /* Displacement of the engine */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power output of the engine */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being produced */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Status of production (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location of production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location of the sale */,
  "sale_person" TEXT /* Salesperson who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_service_type FOREIGN KEY ("service_type") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_service_provider FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "recommended_interval" TEXT /* Recommended interval for the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle service provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle in inventory (e.g., available, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle inventory location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, salesperson) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
